{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Daniri
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Daniri]] were a long-departed race that left behind artifacts like star-nets in their tombs.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c8">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Daniri]] kept tombs.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c15">''City of Light'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate groups]]
